behavior: Secretive ground forager that works leaf litter with quick sideways bill sweeps; also sings from exposed shrubs or treetops.
field_marks: Large, slender songbird with a long rounded tail
Long, dark bill with a slight downward curve
Whitish underparts marked with bold dark streaks
habitat: Dense brush and low cover: thickets, hedgerows, scrubby fields, forest edges, regenerating woods, and shrubby undergrowth.

sources.title: Brown Thrasher Identification — All About Birds
